title: Principal Frontend Developer at Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates:
Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates!
